focus_areas: Circuit topology and component selection — ask only when circuit design IS the novel feature
Signal conditioning, noise rejection and SNR measurements
Power delivery, voltage regulation and efficiency figures
Timing, clock domain and synchronisation specifications
PCB layout constraints and EMC compliance — ask only if PCB layout IS the novel feature
anti_patterns: Do NOT ask voltage/current questions for optics or mechanical inventions
Do NOT ask PCB layout questions unless the PCB itself is the novel contribution
Do NOT ask EMC questions unless electromagnetic compatibility is claimed as novel

Optics / Display.description: Optical systems including light extraction structures, waveguides, imaging paths, luminance uniformity control, ray propagation models, and display architecture.
focus_areas: Structural design and optical architecture — provide drawings (top view, cross-section, ray diagram)
Light extraction structure — dot/feature geometry (shape, size gradient, depth, spacing, density variation)
Governing equation or mathematical model defining the extraction pattern
Luminance uniformity — how it is maintained across all operating modes, and measured uniformity %
Simulation tools and design methodology used for optical optimisation
Material selection and thickness profile of each optical element
Fabrication method used to realise the optical structure (moulding, etching, printing)
Measurable performance improvements vs. prior art (uniformity %, efficiency %, thickness reduction)
anti_patterns: Do NOT ask generic circuit questions (voltage, PCB) unless the control electronics are the novel feature
Do NOT ask about LED drive current unless the current profile IS the optical novelty

focus_areas: Kinematic chain and degree-of-freedom analysis
Material selection and mechanical properties (yield strength, fatigue life)
Tolerance stack-up, fits and clearances
Load cases, stress and fatigue calculations with safety factors
Manufacturing process and assembly sequence
anti_patterns: Do NOT ask electrical questions for purely mechanical inventions

focus_areas: Reaction mechanism and yield optimisation with conversion data
Catalyst identity, loading, and regeneration conditions
Temperature and pressure operating windows with safety limits
Solvent selection, purity grade, and purification steps
Analytical characterisation methods (HPLC, GC-MS, NMR) with acceptance criteria
anti_patterns: Do NOT ask mechanical or electrical questions unless the reactor design is the novelty

focus_areas: Algorithm pseudocode or flowchart with decision logic
Data structures, complexity (time/space) and scalability limits
API contracts, inter-module interfaces and data schemas
Concurrency model, thread safety and synchronisation primitives
Security boundaries, input validation and threat model
anti_patterns: Do NOT ask hardware questions unless the hardware-software interface is the novelty

focus_areas: Biocompatibility standard compliance and sterilisation method (ISO 10993)
Clinical performance parameters and acceptable ranges with evidence
Regulatory classification pathway (ISO 13485, FDA 510(k), CE marking)
Material-tissue interaction, degradation rate and leachables
Failure mode analysis (FMEA) and safety limits
anti_patterns: Do NOT ask generic electronics questions unless the control electronics are novel

focus_areas: Composition (elemental or phase), purity grade and supplier specification
Microstructure and grain size characterisation (SEM, XRD, TEM)
Processing route (sintering temperature/time, rolling reduction, heat treatment cycles)
Mechanical, thermal and electrical property measurements with test standards
Corrosion, wear and environmental durability performance data
anti_patterns: Do NOT ask process equipment questions unless the equipment design is claimed as novel
